arts.ttl: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola tells Spanish media his big career decision – Looking forward to life of golf
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has told the Spanish media that he doesn’t plan to manage another club when he finally leaves the Premier League champions. The Spaniard recently committed himself to Manchester City after it looked like this could be his final season with the club when his contract was due to expire.
